calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-27-2015 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion To Approve Prop 65 Settlement And Entry Of Consent Judgment
Off Calendar Jul-14-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Ryan Hoffman, of Michael Freund & Associates, Tel. 916.216.2347, for plaintiffs;
No other appearances in the matter.

Ruling: A R G U E D. The Court required parties to appear. PLAINTIFF ENVIRONMENTAL RESEARCH CENTER INC.'s Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And Entry Of Consent Judgment is granted. Order and Consent Judgment signed in open court. Judge Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk Felicia Green; Court Reporter Melanie Gheno, CSR No. 7489; Dept. 302. (302/EHG)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-15-2015 Continued To Aug-12-15 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion To Approve Prop 65 Settlement And Entry Of Consent Judgment
Off Calendar Jun-30-2015 Continued To Jul-14-15 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances in the matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: PLAINTIFF ENVIRONMENTAL RESEARCH CENTER INC.'S Motion To Approve Prop 65 Settlement And Entry Of Consent Judgment is continued to July 14, 2015, at 9:30 a.m., in Dept. 302, to give Plaintiff the opportunity to comply with Local Rule 2.6B. Plaintiff must deliver courtesy copies of the moving papers to Department 302, with a cover letter stating the new hearing date, no later than June 30, 2015 at 4:00 pm or the motion will be denied. Any exhibit must be separated by an exhibit tab per CRC 3.1110(f). Judge Joseph M. Quinn; Clerk Felicia Green; Dept. 302. (302/JMQ)
